description: CompositionWhite knit pullover made of 100% cotton, has light blue and navy blue stripes, long sleeves with navy ribbed cuffs, navy blue ribbed V-neck with white tipping, navy blue knit elbow patches and a ribbed hemline FittingComfortWash careWash in cold water using mild detergentDo not bleach, tumble dry or wringDry flat in shadeIron on lowDry cleanableThe navy blue and light blue stripes and elbow patches add smooth styling to this white knit pullover from turtle. The soft cotton knit fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day, while the fashionable cuts offer a flattering silhouette. Part of the proceeds from the sale of this product go towards the Save Turtle project in collaboration with WWF and Wildlife Society of Orissa, making it an environment friendly choice. Team this with shirts or t-shirts and jeans.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and chest 39"
